name: Notion
description: Sync pages and databases from your Notion workspace.

setup_steps.title: Create an integration
setup_steps.description: Go to Notion Integrations and click "+ New integration". Give it a name like "HQ Sync" and select your workspace.

setup_steps.title: Copy the token
setup_steps.description: Under "Internal Integration Secret", click "Show" then "Copy". Paste it below.

setup_steps.title: Share pages with the integration
setup_steps.description: In Notion, open any page or database you want to sync. Click ··· → Connections → find your integration and add it.
